tools/promote_sdu_manifesto_dataverse.ps.recommendation: Open LOCAL_LINE_ENDING_POLICY_G1 or owner-approved whitespace normalization/revert. If owner confirms semantic intent, open DELTA_PROMOTE_SDU_MANIFESTO_DATAVERSE_SCRIPT_G1. Do not commit in this carril.

rows.recommended_owner_decision: Owner review required before ignore, version, normalize, revert, or future delta.
rows.notes: Whitespace-only visible diff plus LF-to-CRLF warning. git diff -w is empty; ignore-space-at-eol and ignore-cr-at-eol still see a leading indentation change. Classified as owner decision because taxonomy has no pure whitespace-only bucket.
